name: Payload-link change stream to Pub/Sub (filtered)
description: Reads the payload_link_changes Spanner change stream, drops records whose every mod has payload_link NULL on both sides, and publishes the remainder to Pub/Sub. Customization of the upstream GoogleCloudPlatform/DataflowTemplates Cloud_Spanner_Change_Streams_to_PubSub template.

parameters.name: spannerProjectId
parameters.label: Spanner project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project that owns the Spanner instance.

parameters.name: spannerInstanceId
parameters.label: Spanner instance ID
parameters.helpText: Spanner instance that holds the syncstorage database.

parameters.name: spannerDatabase
parameters.label: Spanner database
parameters.helpText: Syncstorage database (contains the bsos and batch_bsos tables).

parameters.name: spannerMetadataInstanceId
parameters.label: Spanner metadata instance ID
parameters.helpText: Spanner instance where the change stream's metadata table lives. May be the same as spannerInstanceId.

parameters.name: spannerMetadataDatabase
parameters.label: Spanner metadata database
parameters.helpText: Spanner database where the change stream's metadata table lives. May be the same as spannerDatabase.

parameters.name: changeStreamName
parameters.label: Change stream name
parameters.helpText: Name of the Spanner change stream to consume. Defaults to payload_link_changes.

parameters.name: pubsubTopic
parameters.label: Pub/Sub topic
parameters.helpText: Fully-qualified Pub/Sub topic to publish actionable change records to (projects/<project>/topics/payload-link-changes).

parameters.name: outputDataFormat
parameters.label: Output data format
parameters.helpText: Serialization format for each Pub/Sub message. JSON or AVRO.

parameters.name: numShards
parameters.label: Number of shards
parameters.helpText: Initial number of shards for the change stream reader. Optional; tune for throughput.

parameters.name: startTimestamp
parameters.label: Start timestamp
parameters.helpText: Inclusive start timestamp (RFC 3339). Omit to start from the current time when the pipeline launches.

parameters.name: endTimestamp
parameters.label: End timestamp
parameters.helpText: Inclusive end timestamp (RFC 3339). Omit for an unbounded pipeline.

parameters.name: rpcPriority
parameters.label: RPC priority
parameters.helpText: Spanner RPC priority: HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW. Defaults to HIGH.
